name: Path Academy Student Trnsprtn
recent_news: No web/news footprint found tying this name to school-bus contracting at 235 Etowah Trce, Fayetteville GA; address is on a corridor (Etowah Trace) populated by several small transport entities (Assured Transportation 235, We Care Charters 115, ELW Motorcoach 210, Emerald Transportation Solutions 180). Name suffix 'Trnsprtn' suggests a possible micro-shuttle/charter operator rather than a Yellow-bus contractor; could not confirm via Sunbiz/SOS in search results.
fit_notes: Likely sub-scale and possibly not a true Yellow-bus contractor; low priority absent confirmation of fleet, customers, and ownership.

name: Jake G Schneider Bus Contr LLC
principals: Schneider family (Jake/Jacob Schneider founder; Jacob Schneider obituary 2015)
recent_news: Received $120,800 PPP loan in July 2020 (Dollar Bank) reporting 64 employees at the time. Founder Jacob Schneider died 2015; company continues as LLC at 1609 Smith Township State Rd, Burgettstown PA. Operates as Jake Schneider Bus Contractor.
fit_notes: Classic small family-owned PA rural school-bus operator (~50yr history, founder deceased, likely second-generation in control) - strong succession-driven tuck-in profile for Summit's PA footprint.

name: Harold's School Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: Possible Miami-Dade County Public Schools private bus market
recent_news: No press or M&A footprint found. Name does not appear on the July 2025 Approved M-DCPS Private Bus Companies list reviewed. Address is at 6953 W 36th Ave #201 Hialeah - same general Hialeah cluster as Duque School Bus & After School Care Inc (6540 W 20th Ave), suggesting possible related/family entity given shared Duque principal.
fit_notes: Hialeah micro-operator in fragmented Miami-Dade private bus market; not confirmed on M-DCPS approved list. Sub-scale unless tied to a larger Duque family operation - worth checking Sunbiz for ownership ties to Duque School Bus.

name: B & W Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Bellefonte Area School District and/or Penns Valley Area School District (Centre County PA - likely)
recent_news: FMCSA USDOT #2218003 / MC 130918, active since 2011. SAFER snapshot lists 0 power units (likely indicates registration as Private Passenger Non-business, common for school-bus-only PA contractors that don't hold interstate for-hire authority). Headquartered 228 N McAllister St, Bellefonte PA per SAFER (cf. Benner Pike address in source list).
fit_notes: Small Centre County PA school-bus contractor likely serving Bellefonte/Penns Valley; ownership not identified online. Would need direct outreach/CIDDS or PA Dept of Education data to size fleet and confirm contracts.

name: Minich Bus Svc
principals: Minich family (likely - C. Grant Minich/Dorothy Minich heirs; Michele L. Rowe nee Minich worked Clarion Area SD payroll 35 yrs)
districts_or_customers: Likely Redbank Valley SD, Clarion-Limestone SD, Clarion Area SD or other Clarion County PA districts
recent_news: No direct web/news footprint for the bus operation. Minich family roots in Fairmount City PA (Clarion County) confirmed via local obituaries; Michele L. Rowe (listed as 'Other' contact in source) is a Minich descendant who worked Clarion Area SD payroll for 35 years and retired in 2021 - suggests family/intergenerational tie to local school transportation but no public confirmation of bus-company ownership or fleet.
fit_notes: Tiny rural Clarion County PA family operator with strong succession signals (aging Minich generation, daughter retired from Clarion SD). Likely too small to be a standalone target but a potential roll-up candidate if Summit is consolidating PA Route 66 corridor contractors.
